title: Bloub 4 MC
description: Adds a physics toy to the inventory screen
body:
# Bloub for Minecraft
This mod adds a physics toy to your inventory. Have some fun and throw it around whenever you're bored! You can drag and it'll bounce off the edged of your screen. Use right-click to launch it.

This is a port of my [desktop physics toy](<https://github.com/TheEpicBlock/Bloub>) to Minecraft.

![Made for ModFest: Toybox](https://github.com/ModFest/art/raw/refs/heads/v2/badge/svg/toybox/cozy.svg)

![Short clip of the mod in action. A slimeblock sprite is dragged with the mouse, thrown against the right-hand side of the screen, and then caught again.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Xx7t493Q/images/70137a4980f25084e92042517802a8eab0abcf47.gif)
